Document:
## The Vistula Institute The Vistula Institute is an organization dedicated to the enlightenment of the peoples of the Danzyg Trade Union. Founded in 1430 P.C by one "Olivia Shaw" after a pre-Crepitum information archive was found, giving them a significant edge in technology and research compared to other members in the DTU. It has three branches dedicated to different fields;
The most popular of which is Vacuum-Meteorology and Subspace/Realspace Monitoring (VMSRM). VMSRM offers automated reports on vacuum weather and entropic Bluespace phenomena. They've been given full clearance by the Danyzg Trade Council to cordon areas of high entropy, to keep the public safe.
Still popular, the Academy of Sciences and Philosophy (abbr. Academy), is a branch that exports high-quality lifetime career researchers for cheap. Very similar in structure to ancient colleges.
And the most obscure of the three, Results Oriented Analysis (ROA). ROA is an inhouse research and development program that actually makes up the majority of the Institute's funding, pulling exclusive contracts from all across the DTU. Despite a "no questions asked" policy, higher ups are known to reject proposals with far-reaching moral implications, primarily out of a desire to save face.
